name: ET 2.60b Classic (Wolffiles)
author: hosting@wolffiles.eu
description: Classic Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory 2.60b dedicated server. Compatible with all mods. Optimized for Wolffiles.eu hosting.
startup: ./etded.x86 +set dedicated 2 +set net_port {{SERVER_PORT}} +set sv_maxclients {{MAX_PLAYERS}} +set fs_game {{MOD}} +set g_password "{{SERVER_PASSWORD}}" +set rconPassword "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}" +set sv_hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}" +map {{MAP}} +exec {{CONFIG_FILE}} +set sv_punkbuster 0 +set com_hunkmegs {{HUNK_MEGS}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt update
apt install -y curl unzip ca-certificates lib32gcc-s1 lib32stdc++6 2>/dev/null || true

cd /mnt/server

echo "========================================"
echo " Wolffiles.eu ET 2.60b Server Installer"
echo "========================================"

## Download ET 2.60b full
if [ ! -f "etded.x86" ]; then
    echo "Downloading ET 2.60b..."
    curl -sSL -o et260b.zip "https://filebase.trackbase.net/et/full/et260b.x86_full.zip" || {
        curl -sSL -o et260b.zip "https://wolffiles.eu/downloads/et260b.x86_full.zip"
    }
    
    if [ -f et260b.zip ]; then
        unzip -o et260b.zip
        rm -f et260b.zip
        
        ## Extract the .run installer
        if ls *.run 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then
            chmod +x *.run
            ./*.run --noexec --target /tmp/et-install
            cp -r /tmp/et-install/* ./ 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf /tmp/et-install *.run
        fi
    fi
fi

chmod +x etded.x86 2>/dev/null || true

## Create directories
mkdir -p etmain
mkdir -p logs

## Create default config
if [ ! -f "etmain/server.cfg" ]; then
    cat > etmain/server.cfg << 'CFG'
// Wolffiles.eu ET 2.60b Server Config
set sv_hostname      "ET 2.60b - Wolffiles.eu"
set sv_maxclients    24
set g_gametype       6
set timelimit        30
set g_warmup         30
set g_doWarmup       1
set sv_maxRate       25000
set sv_allowDownload 1
set g_log            "logs/etded.log"
set sv_mapRotation   "map oasis; map goldrush; map battery; map radar; map railgun; map fuel_dump"
CFG
fi

echo "========================================"
echo " ET 2.60b Installation complete!"
echo "========================================"

variables.name: Mod
variables.description: Game mod: etmain, etpro, jaymod, nitmod, noquarter, silent
